topic: Skill-advisor hook surface architecture research for phase 020. Investigate: (a) per-runtime hook trigger-point availability (Claude UserPromptSubmit, Codex equivalent, Copilot equivalent, Gemini equivalent) — concrete code references to existing hooks; (b) empirical latency + cache-TTL curve plan using the 019/004 200-prompt corpus; (c) freshness signal semantics parallel to code-graph getGraphFreshness (live/stale/absent/unavailable); (d) context-budget tradeoffs for brief-length (40/60/80/120 tokens) vs routing-quality retention; (e) failure-mode + fail-open contract for subprocess errors; (f) cross-runtime snapshot-test harness design. Produce ranked implementation-cluster decomposition with child spec-folder mapping (020/002-*, 020/003-*, ...). Pattern reference: lib/code-graph/startup-brief.ts + its per-runtime session-prime hooks in mcp_server/hooks/{claude,gemini,copilot}/. Dispatch on spec folder .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/020-skill-advisor-hook-surface/001-initial-research/ with iteration budget 10.
